cases.title: Test user behavior, not implementation
cases.prompt: Write tests for a login form component. Test what the user sees and does, not internal state or component methods. Include the success case, validation errors, and loading state.

cases.title: Test a Server Action with MSW
cases.prompt: Write integration tests for a createTask Server Action that calls an external API. Mock the HTTP layer with MSW, not the module. Test success, validation failure, and network error cases.

cases.title: Correct mock cleanup in Vitest 4
cases.prompt: Set up a test file that uses both vi.mock() for a module and vi.spyOn() for a method. Show the correct afterEach cleanup that handles both automocks and manual spies in Vitest 4.

cases.title: Test async logic without arbitrary sleeps
cases.prompt: Write a test for a function that debounces an API call by 300ms. Use fake timers to control time, never sleep(). Show how to advance timers and flush promises.

cases.title: Vitest 4 coverage configuration
cases.prompt: Configure Vitest 4 with V8 coverage. Require 80% coverage thresholds, include only src/ files, and use maxWorkers for CI performance. Show the full vitest.config.ts.
